content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: review(patch)
H: "hdr_override,spoof(x-user-id),authz_bypass" ⇒ "public_api->spoof(x-user-id)->override(session.userId)"
P: drop_hdr(x-user-id) → sess_only → server_derive_user
V: "req(hdr:x-user-id=other)->401|ignore_hdr" ∧ cross_user_access_denied
R: ! account_takeover ∧ ! idor
A: spoof_denied

[AUDIT]
Treat "hdr override,spoof(x-user-id),authz bypass" as a header auth risk, apply drop hdr(x-user-id), and verify spoofed requests fail.
